Initializer# init(subjectNameX509:signatureAlg:signatureOid:cspHand:subjectPublicKey:subjectPrivateKey:challengeString:)

macOS 10.0+

```
init(
    subjectNameX509: UnsafeMutablePointer<cssm_x509_name>!,
    signatureAlg: CSSM_ALGORITHMS,
    signatureOid: SecAsn1Oid,
    cspHand: CSSM_CSP_HANDLE,
    subjectPublicKey: UnsafePointer<cssm_key>!,
    subjectPrivateKey: UnsafePointer<cssm_key>!,
    challengeString: UnsafePointer<CChar>!
)
```
